title: erlang BIFs batch 2 — list operation stubs
purpose: Fill remaining lists module BIF gaps needed by OTP: sort/1, sort/2, keyfind/3, keystore/5, keysort/2, nth/2, flatten/1, zip/2, unzip/1, all/2, any/2, filter/2, filtermap/2, foreach/2. These are used throughout OTP for list manipulation.
task: Register ~15 lists module BIFs as native stubs.

requirements.title: List query BIFs
requirements.spec: lists:nth/2 (1-based index), lists:member/2, lists:keyfind/3 (find tuple by key position), lists:last/1.

requirements.title: List transformation BIFs
requirements.spec: lists:sort/1, lists:flatten/1, lists:zip/2, lists:unzip/1, lists:filter/2, lists:filtermap/2.
acceptance: filter uses trampoline for closure invocation

requirements.title: List key-manipulation BIFs
acceptance: foreach applies function to each element (side-effect only)

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement lists:usort or lists:umerge — uncommon in workflow code
Higher-order BIFs (filter, sort/2, foreach) use the trampoline calling convention from B-038
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
